article.body_preview:
DHAKA, Jan 31, 2023 (BSS) - Commerce Minister Tipu Munshi today said that the 27th edition of the Dhaka International Trade Fair (DITF) 2023 drew export orders worth around Taka 300 crore while it also witnessed trading of goods around Taka 100 crore.

Tipu also informed that the visitors in the fair were increased by 37 percent from the last year as some 35 lakh people visited the month-long fair.
